---
params:
  county: "Salt Lake"
  data_dir: "data/remotes"
format:
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 0.4in
      y: 0.35in
    fontsize: 8pt
---

```{=typst}
#set page(flipped: true)
#set text(size: 7pt)
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(yaml)

settings    <- yaml::read_yaml("config/settings.yml")
report_data <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "report_data.rds"))
tract_maps  <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "tract_maps.rds"))

county_data <- dplyr::filter(report_data, county == params$county) |>
  dplyr::arrange(GEOID)

county_maps <- tract_maps[county_data$GEOID]
```

```{r}
#| label: save-maps
#| include: false
# Shared map_cache/ with summary — PNGs already written if summary ran first.
map_dir <- file.path(params$data_dir, "map_cache")
dir.create(map_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

map_paths <- purrr::imap_chr(county_maps, function(map, geoid) {
  path <- file.path(map_dir, paste0(geoid, ".png"))
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = path,
    plot     = map,
    width    = settings$map_width_in,
    height   = settings$map_height_in,
    dpi      = 200,
    bg       = "white"
  )
  path
})
```

```{r}
#| label: pages
#| results: asis
#| echo: false

# Format a metric value; returns em-dash for NA / non-finite.
fmt_val <- function(x, digits = 1, suffix = "") {
  if (length(x) == 0 || is.na(x)) return("—")
  if (is.numeric(x) && !is.finite(x)) return("—")
  paste0(round(x, digits), suffix)
}

# Safe column access — NA_real_ when absent.
col_val <- function(data, col) {
  if (col %in% names(data)) data[[col]] else NA_real_
}

# Section header row inside a table (code-mode context: no leading #).
sec <- function(label) {
  sprintf(
    'table.cell(colspan: 2, fill: rgb("#003b4f"), inset: (x: 4pt, y: 3pt))[#text(fill: white, weight: "bold")[%s]]',
    label
  )
}

# Key-value row inside a table.
kv <- function(label, value) sprintf("    [%s], [%s],", label, value)

# Build a Typst table(...) call (no leading # — for use in code-mode contexts
# such as #grid(...) positional arguments).
inner_tbl <- function(rows) {
  paste0(
    c("table(columns: (auto, 1fr), stroke: none, inset: (x: 3pt, y: 2pt),",
      rows,
      ")"),
    collapse = "\n"
  )
}

# Generate the full Typst block for one tract page.
tract_page <- function(tract, map_path, is_first) {
  g  <- function(col)                 col_val(tract, col)
  fv <- function(col, d = 1, s = "") fmt_val(g(col), d, s)

  county_str <- as.character(g("county"))
  geoid_str  <- as.character(g("GEOID"))
  oz_class   <- if (is.na(g("oztoolclassification"))) "—"
                else as.character(g("oztoolclassification"))
  pvrty_str  <- if (is.na(g("pvrty_r"))) "—" else as.character(g("pvrty_r"))
  unmpl_str  <- if (is.na(g("unmpl_r"))) "—" else as.character(g("unmpl_r"))
  mfi_str    <- if (is.na(g("mfi")))     "—"
                else format(as.integer(g("mfi")), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE)

  pb <- if (!is_first) "#pagebreak()\n" else ""

  # ── Col 2: Tract basics + composite metrics — one table, two section headers
  col2 <- inner_tbl(c(
    paste0("  ", sec("Tract Basics"), ","),
    kv("Population",         fv("pop",          0)),
    kv("Households",         fv("hh",           0)),
    kv("Total Acres",        fv("total_acres",   1)),
    sprintf("    [OZ 1.0 Acres], [%s (%s%%)],", fv("oz1_acres", 1), fv("oz1_pct", 1)),
    kv("Dev. Acres",         fv("dev_acres",     1)),
    paste0("  ", sec("Composite Metrics"), ","),
    kv("MUorC Coverage",      fv("wc_muc_pct",             1, "%")),
    kv("ATO Score (0-100)",   fv("ato_composite",           1)),
    kv("SAP Housing/Acre",    fv("sap_planned_hh_per_acre", 2)),
    kv("ERU/Acre (2027-37)",  fv("eru_per_acre",            2))
  ))

  # ── Col 3: Centers
  col3 <- inner_tbl(c(
    paste0("  ", sec("Centers (% of Tract)"), ","),
    kv("Metropolitan Ctr", fv("wc_pct_metropolitan_center", 1, "%")),
    kv("Urban Ctr",        fv("wc_pct_urban_center",        1, "%")),
    kv("City Ctr",         fv("wc_pct_city_center",         1, "%")),
    kv("Neighborhood Ctr", fv("wc_pct_neighborhood_center", 1, "%")),
    kv("Employment Dist.", fv("wc_pct_employment_district", 1, "%")),
    kv("Industrial Dist.", fv("wc_pct_industrial_district", 1, "%")),
    kv("Retail Dist.",     fv("wc_pct_retail_district",     1, "%"))
  ))

  # ── Col 4: Housing
  col4 <- inner_tbl(c(
    paste0("  ", sec("Housing"), ","),
    kv("Total Units",  fv("units_total",     0)),
    kv("Res. Acres",   fv("res_acres_total", 1)),
    kv("SFD Acres",    fv("res_acres_sfd",   1)),
    kv("MF/SFA Acres", fv("res_acres_mf_sfa",1))
  ))

  # ── Col 5: Urban Institute
  col5 <- inner_tbl(c(
    paste0("  ", sec("Urban Institute"), ","),
    kv("Poverty Rate",         pvrty_str),
    kv("Unemp. Rate",          unmpl_str),
    kv("Median Family Income", mfi_str)
  ))

  # ── Bottom row: transit | auto | growth
  bot1 <- inner_tbl(c(
    paste0("  ", sec("Transit"), ","),
    kv("Rail/BRT Stops",     fv("transit_stop_count", 0)),
    kv("SAP Acres",          fv("sap_acres",          1)),
    kv("SAP %",              fv("sap_pct",            1, "%")),
    kv("ATO Jobs (Transit)", fv("ato_jobtransit",     0)),
    kv("ATO HHs (Transit)",  fv("ato_hhtransit",      0))
  ))

  bot2 <- inner_tbl(c(
    paste0("  ", sec("Auto"), ","),
    kv("Freeway Exits",   fv("freeway_exit_count", 0)),
    kv("ATO Jobs (Auto)", fv("ato_jobauto",        0)),
    kv("ATO HHs (Auto)",  fv("ato_hhauto",         0))
  ))

  bot3 <- inner_tbl(c(
    paste0("  ", sec("Projected Growth 2027-2037"), ","),
    kv("HHs Added",  fv("hh_added",   0)),
    kv("Pop. Added", fv("pop_added",  0)),
    kv("Jobs Added", fv("jobs_added", 0)),
    kv("ERU Added",  fv("eru_added",  0)),
    kv("ERU/Acre",   fv("eru_per_acre",2))
  ))

  lines <- c(
    pb,

    # Page header band (markup mode — # prefix required)
    sprintf(
      '#block(width: 100%%, fill: rgb("#003b4f"), inset: (x: 0.15in, y: 0.07in))[#grid(columns: (1fr, auto))[#text(fill: white, weight: "bold", size: 9pt)[%s County — Tract %s]][#align(right)[#text(fill: rgb("#7ec8e3"), size: 7pt)[%s]]]]',
      county_str, geoid_str, oz_class
    ),
    "#v(0.08in)",

    # Top 5-column grid: map | basics+composites | centers | housing | UI
    # Items are code-mode positional args — no # on function names
    "#grid(columns: (2.8in, 1.8in, 1.8in, 1.5in, 1.5in), gutter: 0.1in,",
    sprintf('  image("%s", width: 100%%),', map_path),
    paste0("  ", col2, ","),
    paste0("  ", col3, ","),
    paste0("  ", col4, ","),
    paste0("  ", col5),
    ")",

    "#v(0.08in)",

    # Bottom 3-column grid: transit | auto | growth
    "#grid(columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr), gutter: 0.1in,",
    paste0("  ", bot1, ","),
    paste0("  ", bot2, ","),
    paste0("  ", bot3),
    ")",

    "#v(0.05in)",
    '#text(size: 6pt, fill: rgb("#888888"))[Sources: Federal OZ 2.0 eligibility, Urban Institute, WFRC/MAG regional data. Growth projections 2027-2037. ATO = Access to Opportunities.]'
  )

  paste0(lines, collapse = "\n")
}

# Emit one raw Typst block per tract, separated by page breaks.
for (i in seq_len(nrow(county_data))) {
  tract <- county_data[i, ]
  geoid <- as.character(tract$GEOID)
  cat("``` {=typst}\n")
  cat(tract_page(tract, map_paths[[geoid]], i == 1))
  cat("\n```\n\n")
}
```
